mapper.select:
select count(*) from io IO LEFT JOIN lot L ON IO.io_lot = L.lot_id
LEFT JOIN item I ON L.lot_item = I.item_id
AND IO.io_type = #{ioType}
AND IO.io_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND IO.io_date < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND ( UPPER(IO.io_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(IO.io_lot) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(IO.io_vendor) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(I.item_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(I.item_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )
AND IO.io_usage = 'Y'

select * from ( select rownum rn, I.* from ( SELECT IO.io_id AS ioId, IO.io_type AS ioType, IO.io_reason AS ioReason, IO.io_vendor AS ioVendor, IO.io_lot AS ioLot, IO.io_qty AS ioQty, IO.io_date AS ioDate, IO.io_worker AS ioWorker, IO.io_msg AS ioMsg,
I.item_id AS itemId, I.item_name AS itemName
FROM io IO
LEFT JOIN lot L ON IO.io_lot = L.lot_id
LEFT JOIN item I ON L.lot_item = I.item_id
AND IO.io_type = #{ioType}
AND IO.io_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND IO.io_date < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND ( UPPER(IO.io_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(IO.io_lot) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(IO.io_vendor) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(I.item_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') OR UPPER(I.item_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%') )
AND IO.io_usage = 'Y'
ORDER BY IO.io_date DESC ) I ) where rn between #{page.startRow} and #{page.endRow}

SELECT IO.IO_ID AS ioId, IO.IO_TYPE AS ioType, IO.IO_REASON AS ioReason,
IO.IO_VENDOR AS ioVendor, V.VENDOR_NAME AS vendorName,
IO.IO_LOT AS ioLot,
IO.IO_QTY AS ioQty, IO.IO_DATE AS ioDate,
L.LOT_FQTY AS lotFqty, TO_CHAR(L.LOT_EXP, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lotExpText,
IO.IO_WORKER AS ioWorker, E.EMP_NAME AS workerName,
IO.IO_MSG AS ioMsg,
I.ITEM_ID AS itemId, I.ITEM_NAME AS itemName, I.ITEM_TYPE AS itemType,
CASE WHEN L.LOT_QC = 'N' THEN L.LOT_BWHSEC WHEN L.LOT_QC = 'Y' THEN L.LOT_AWHSEC END AS whSec,
WS.WH_SEC_WHID AS whId
FROM IO IO
LEFT JOIN VENDOR V ON IO.IO_VENDOR = V.VENDOR_ID
LEFT JOIN LOT L ON IO.IO_LOT = L.LOT_ID
LEFT JOIN ITEM I ON L.LOT_ITEM = I.ITEM_ID
LEFT JOIN WH_SEC WS ON WS.WH_SEC_ID = CASE WHEN L.LOT_QC = 'N' THEN L.LOT_BWHSEC WHEN L.LOT_QC = 'Y' THEN L.LOT_AWHSEC END
LEFT JOIN EMP E ON IO.IO_WORKER = E.EMP_ID
WHERE IO.IO_ID = #{ioId} AND IO.IO_USAGE = 'Y'
SELECT item_id AS itemId, item_name AS itemName, item_type AS itemType FROM item WHERE item_type = #{itemType} AND item_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY item_name ASC
SELECT vendor_id AS vendorId, vendor_name AS vendorName FROM vendor WHERE vendor_usage = 'Y' ORDER BY vendor_name ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT LOT_ID AS lotId, LOT_ITEM AS lotItem, LOT_FQTY AS lotFqty, TO_CHAR(LOT_EXP, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS lotExpText, LOT_STATUS AS lotStatus FROM LOT WHERE LOT_ITEM = #{itemId} AND LOT_FQTY > 0 AND LOT_STATUS IN (10, 20) ORDER BY LOT_EXP ASC, LOT_ID ASC )
WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IO ( IO_ID, IO_TYPE, IO_REASON, IO_VENDOR, IO_LOT, IO_QTY, IO_DATE, IO_WORKER, IO_MSG, IO_USAGE ) VALUES ( #{ioId}, #{ioType}, #{ioReason}, #{ioVendor}, #{ioLot}, #{ioQty}, #{ioDate}, #{ioWorker}, #{ioMsg}, 'Y' )

INSERT INTO LOT ( LOT_ID, LOT_ITEM, LOT_VENDOR, LOT_WORK, LOT_QTY, LOT_CQTY, LOT_FQTY, LOT_MFD, LOT_ETW, LOT_EXP, LOT_QC, LOT_STATUS, LOT_MEMO, LOT_BWHSEC, LOT_AWHSEC ) VALUES ( 'LOT' || LOT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{itemId}, #{ioVendor}, NULL, #{ioQty}, 0, 0, NULL, #{ioDate}, ( SELECT #{ioDate} + ITEM_USEDATE FROM ITEM WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId} ), 'N', 40, #{ioMsg}, #{whSec}, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE io SET io_usage = 'N' WHERE io_id = #{ioId}

UPDATE io SET io_type = #{ioType}, io_reason = #{ioReason}, io_vendor = #{ioVendor}, io_lot = #{ioLot}, io_qty = #{ioQty}, io_date = #{ioDate}, io_worker = #{ioWorker}, io_msg = #{ioMsg} WHERE io_id = #{ioId}
mapper.select: select vendor_name as vendorName, vendor_id as vendorId from vendor where vendor_type = #{vendorType} and vendor_usage = 'Y'

SELECT emp_id AS empId, emp_name AS empName FROM emp
emp_inoffice = 0
AND ( UPPER(emp_id) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{_parameter} || '%') OR UPPER(emp_name) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{_parameter} || '%') )
ORDER BY emp_id
mapper.update: UPDATE LOT SET LOT_FQTY = LOT_FQTY - #{ioQty}, LOT_STATUS = CASE WHEN LOT_FQTY - #{ioQty} = 0 THEN 30 WHEN LOT_FQTY - #{ioQty} > 0 THEN 20 ELSE LOT_STATUS END WHERE LOT_ID = #{ioLot} AND LOT_FQTY >= #{ioQty}
mapper.select: SELECT W.WH_ID AS whId, W.WH_NAME AS whName, W.WH_TYPE AS whTypeNo, W.WH_QTY AS whQty, W.WH_LOC AS whLoc FROM warehouse W WHERE W.WH_TYPE = ( SELECT ITEM_WHTYPE FROM ITEM WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId} ) AND W.WH_USAGE = 'Y' ORDER BY W.WH_ID

SELECT ws.WH_SEC_ID AS secId, ws.WH_SEC_WHID AS secWhId, ws.WH_SEC_QTY AS secQty, NVL(lot_sum.currentLotCnt, 0) AS secPrevQty, ws.WH_SEC_USAGE AS secUsage FROM WH_SEC ws LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT lot_location.secId AS secId, COUNT(lot_location.lotId) AS currentLotCnt FROM ( SELECT lot.lot_id AS lotId, CASE WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'N' THEN lot.lot_bwhsec WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'Y' THEN lot.lot_awhsec END AS secId FROM lot lot LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT lu.use_lot AS lotId, SUM(NVL(lu.use_qty, 0)) AS totalUseQty FROM lot_use lu GROUP BY lu.use_lot ) use_sum ON lot.lot_id = use_sum.lotId WHERE lot.lot_status IN (10, 20) AND ( CASE WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'N' THEN NVL(lot.lot_qty, 0) WHEN lot.lot_qc = 'Y' THEN NVL(lot.lot_fqty, 0) ELSE 0 END - NVL(use_sum.totalUseQty, 0) ) > 0 ) lot_location GROUP BY lot_location.secId ) lot_sum ON ws.WH_SEC_ID = lot_sum.secId WHERE ws.WH_SEC_WHID = #{whId} AND ws.WH_SEC_USAGE = 'Y' ORDER BY ws.WH_SEC_ID
